itemListElement.reviewBody: The school has good method of engaging the kids and encourages extra curricular and public speaking . Alas the management is rude and irresponsible. They also need to teach the staff to speak properly
The management is hopeless and irresponsible

My son is currently in grade 2 and we had a fantastic experience with the school in the previous academic year. All the teachers are very supportive, caring and make sure each and every kid is attended to. As parents, we could see a lot of difference in our child before and after he joined Athena. His language skills improved tremendously and he became very confident. Special mention to Krithiga mam( class teacher) who spent lot of time with us to understand our child and gave him the space and opportunity he needed and moulded him very nicely and secondly Poorna mam(maths teacher) who took tremendous effort in making sure kids understand all the concepts before moving to the next topic. It was very much evident from the way he loved to do maths homework on his own. I would also like to thank  Swetha mam, hindi mam, ICT mam  for making the subjects very  easy and interesting  for him and also PE sir for his sports classes. Apart from academics, yoga and physical education is also given lot of importance. The annual day function was fabulous. All the kids were awarded based on their talent which usually  does not happen in other schools. And the kids performances were superb that shows how much effort the teachers had put in to make it a grand success.
This is definitely one of the best IGCSE schools  out there .We are extremely happy to have chosen this school for our son and he simply loves and enjoys going to school.

Our personal experience with Athena global school so far has been fantastic with lots of positive vibrations seen in my child. The best thing about the school is their lovely teachers who has the ability to create a close bond with the kids and bring the best out of them. My son keeps jumping when he thinks about the school and that's purely the success of the teachers contribution. A very special thanks to beloved maths teacher Poorna mam for her wonderful teaching skills and perseverance in adopting new techniques to bring the best out of the kids.

Also a word of praise for Tamil mam (Sujatha) who is liked by all for her simplicity and availability in addressing issues or providing an extra hand for learning out of the box. Thanks ma for all your hard work. Special thanks to Krithika mam for getting our child's basics in English strong.

In fact we are very happy with all the teachers and the school management.

All the  schools staff, teachers, and principal of Athena are really very good & super cool. I have a good experience with the School from past two years. The class teacher Mrs Ezil is really very good, caring, loving, understanding with all kids. Special Thanks to Principal mam and Ezil mam  for taking care of my kid, i can see progressive growth in my child.  All i say; Thank you very much AGS.

This is the best school i had ever found while am looking for my kid, i just went for enquiry and the way Krithika Mam explained and shown me each and every classroom and detail explanation made me to opt this school and the way they support is great and no bad side for this school, and their support and online classes are well planned and even in cases of delay or postpone requested it's full filled with extra care by class teacher Swetha Mam,Poorna Mam and Uthara Mam for my kid, and other teachers also supported great even sacrifing their lunch periods and the effort they kept is very great feeling for every parent, and recently due to health issues my kid didnot attend school last six months, here comes the biggest difference not like any other school, they had taken extra care for kid investing their lunch time and waiting for one hour or more even after school time ,teachers had given mind blowing support even after school giving their personal time for the child's bright future, so I strongly recommend this school and can join with out any hesitation, if you talk to the principal Josephine Mam you will definitely know about the school. And most importantly the school ambience and the atmosphere is very well maintained that it will give joy for the children to come school and play and enjoy the school, one thing I want to say is that every teacher takes care of the students equally to the parents. So it's big thing and bright future we have to be particular, and this schools is the best option for thier future building...

A place that is safe for kids both physically and psychologically. Every kid is given at most attention and the teachers focus on the individual kids development needs. Continuously motivates and encourages them. All the high decibel events have been well organised and the kids were very well recognised for their talents. The weekly updates to the parents kept us intact with the happenings at school. We were well informed about all the activities the children do and it gives us more confidence in their development. Communication is one key differiciator and bigs kudos to the entire team. The school is open and transperant enough which makes us feel comfortable to discuss about the child's progress. As a parent I had great experience and my son Jeshwanth really learnt a lot with lot of fun. I think they groom the child socially responsible by involving them in social events like road safety, nursery visits, support the needy people, that's truly inspiring.  Even when he had to take a break for 3weeks during his fracture, there were sessions organised virtually exclusively for him, so he doesn't miss his classes. Thank his class teacher Ms.Ezhilarasi and his principal Ms.Josephine for all the support extended and my sincere appreciation to all the staffs who were supporting my son's 1st year school journey to be seamless and interesting. Great start...
